recentTweets.text:
I’m grateful for the faith that grounds me, humbles me, and guides each step I take in the halls of the United States Congress.

I take seriously my responsibility to protect the freedoms our Founders secured, including every American’s right to live out their faith. https://t.co/86rzl1s9CG

As a pastor, I believe churches should never have to choose between their tax-exempt status and their First Amendment rights.

@RepJeffCrank and I joined @ACLJ in filing an amicus brief challenging the Johnson Amendment before the Fifth Circuit. https://t.co/XoReF7QFAX

Thanks to President Trump and his Administration, American families and communities are safer.

Grateful for their work to secure our border and reverse the damage caused by the Biden Administration’s open-border policies.

From breaking news and severe weather to the stories that bring our communities together, local broadcasters are there when North Carolinians need them most.

I was proud to join more than 70 colleagues last year in urging the @FCC to modernize its outdated national ownership

The findings released by the White House this evening should deeply disturb every American, Republican or Democrat, and demonstrate the undeniable need for stronger safeguards in our elections.

The integrity of our elections and the American people’s confidence in them depend on
Read more here: https://t.co/CbYfNgrmXP

Proud to lead my colleagues in a letter urging the FNA to prioritize experience, technology, and proven results as it selects a contractor to investigate SNAP retailer fraud.

Every dollar should help a family put food on the table, not benefit those who exploit the program. https://t.co/NjWEKB02nt

Grateful to have Elizabeth and Preston serving in our Washington office this summer.

Their hard work, enthusiasm, and dedication to North Carolina’s Eighth Congressional District have made them a tremendous asset to our team. I know they both have bright futures ahead! https://t.co/Kg0YGMpoBo

You cannot make this up.

Democrats’ star witness at today’s Senate Judiciary Committee hearing served as a pardon attorney in Biden’s DOJ and recommended clemency for all 40 federal death-row inmates—including the Boston Marathon bomber.

Under President Biden, our justice

Congress has a responsibility to ensure federal programs uphold the principles of fairness and equal treatment that America was founded upon. My Equal Treatment for Farmers Act does exactly that.

Read my latest in @CarolinaJournal:
https://t.co/XaxRhGkFvq

Americans’ hard-earned tax dollars should never be used to fund the nation’s largest abortion provider, whose work denies unborn children the right to life.

Every child, born and unborn, is made in God’s image and deserves the opportunity to fulfill his or her God-given purpose. https://t.co/l2Fm1wyZRD

Today, the @EdWorkforceCmte advanced 10 bills, including my Less Bureaucracy, Better K-12 Education Act and Less Bureaucracy, Better Higher Education Act.

Grateful for my colleagues’ support as we move closer to cutting unnecessary bureaucracy and putting students first. https://t.co/Nl85cQtRLA

The House just passed its third FY 2027 appropriations bill.

It strengthens America’s national security, supports our allies, confronts Communist China and other adversaries, blocks taxpayer funding for radical programs overseas, and cuts $2.69 billion in spending.  

America’s

Glad to join @TRUCKINGdotORG for a roundtable on the impact of third-party litigation financing on the trucking industry.

I also appreciated hearing from North Carolina Trucking Association President and CEO Ben Greenberg about the challenges facing truckers across our state. https://t.co/r8YBq01z9n

Jack Smith must be investigated and prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law.

This new evidence confirms what we already knew: Jack Smith abused his authority to target President Trump and Members of Congress, then lied about it under oath.

NO ONE is above the law.

.@JudiciaryGOP advanced seven bills to protect children, uphold the rule of law, and strengthen public safety.

Among them was the Chloe Cole Act, which would allow children harmed by irreversible gender-transition procedures and their parents to seek justice. https://t.co/7YXO9y1G6e

I'm deeply honored to receive the 2026 Hero of Main Street Award from @NRFnews.

Retailers and small businesses across North Carolina are the backbone of our communities, and I'll continue fighting for policies that help them and their workers succeed and thrive. https://t.co/yr5HTWlTu5
RT @WSHStand: .@HHSGov officials denied an NPR report claiming that they are dropping plans to ban Medicaid funding for hospitals doing tra…

A lawful purchase is not a crime, and law-abiding Americans should not be treated like suspects.

Yesterday, the House passed the Protecting Privacy in Purchases Act to stop financial surveillance and protect Americans’ privacy and Second Amendment rights. https://t.co/74uOaUIBxT

RT @WashTimesOpEd: Does faith belong in government?

@RepMarkHarrisNC and Billy Hallowell explore this question on God, Country & the Ameri…

Proud to see North Carolina ranked No. 1 for economy, No. 2 for business, and No. 3 for workforce by @CNBC.

With 33,000+ jobs created in 2025 and 300,000+ jobs projected by 2028, our great state continues to create opportunities for North Carolinians.

https://t.co/J3WtNlyCT6

Proud to cosponsor @RepBrandonGill’s Restoring Equal Opportunity Act to codify President Trump’s order restoring merit-based, race-neutral decision-making in employment and housing.

Americans deserve equal opportunity based on merit—not race or quotas. Let’s get this passed. https://t.co/Xl1rXhAkgX

Today in the @EdWorkforceCmte, we examined the growing influence of radical ideology in medical education.

My Republican colleagues and I are working to return medical schools to their intended mission: educating skilled physicians who put science and patients first. https://t.co/3xMOe7lOOX

RT @WhiteHouse: Fight. Fight. Fight. 🇺🇸

Two years ago today, in Butler, PA, an assassin opened fire on President Donald J. Trump.  

By th…

Delighted to see @SecVetAffairs and @SteaknShake launch a new initiative expanding business ownership opportunities for America’s veterans. 

By waiving franchise fees and prioritizing veterans, this program creates a pathway to entrepreneurship.  
https://t.co/8LnA0aAC9A

For decades, Senator Lindsey Graham devoted his life to serving the people of South Carolina and our nation. He earned a reputation as one of the most influential voices in the United States Senate, particularly on issues of national security, support for our military, and the
“Jesus looked at them and said, ‘With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.’” – Matthew 19:26

I am grateful for FirstHealth of the Carolinas and the Lung Cancer Initiative for their work to expand access to lung cancer screenings across our region.

Together, they’re helping reduce barriers and connect high-risk individuals with life-saving care.

https://t.co/E3FT3rh9cj

I recently had the pleasure of speaking at Sweet Home Baptist Church in Albemarle as we celebrated our nation’s 250th birthday.

We should never take for granted the religious liberty that has allowed generations of Americans to freely live out their faith and worship God. https://t.co/TWnncljuh2

I was proud to join my colleagues in urging VA Secretary Doug Collins to preserve Directive 1123.

Veterans should never receive a lower standard of care than civilians. They fought for our country, and we must ensure they receive the high-quality care they earned. https://t.co/unbYaJ2agr
Learn more about these two bills here: https://t.co/mDOc98nSV2

Education should be about students, not Washington bureaucracy.

Today, I introduced two bills to move the administration of certain federal education programs to the Department of Labor and better serve students and families. https://t.co/GfNALbCzRK

Team Harris recently attended the grand opening of the new Wagram Family Practice facility.

I am proud to represent a district that invests in providing high-quality care closer to rural families in our community. https://t.co/sJKvLwRKZB

Glad to join @RepDeborahRoss in celebrating the Carolina Hurricanes and recognizing Raleigh as a hockey town and North Carolina as a hockey state.   This resolution honors the team’s success and lasting impact—a big win for hockey fans across North Carolina. https://t.co/kPdu5FRzH2

Proud to see two @UnionCoSheriff deputies receive the Lifesaver Award for rescuing a resident from a burning home.

Their courage and selfless service remind us of the sacrifices law enforcement officers make every day to protect our communities.

https://t.co/LALXUojACZ https://t.co/aZyaRQEGQg

Honored to join the @UnionWestRotary to share an update from Washington and hear directly from local leaders in Union County.

Their dedication to serving others and strengthening our community reflects the very best of our community.

Grateful for the warm welcome! https://t.co/ZsikMjBli3

A brighter financial future starts today, thanks to President Trump.

Trump Accounts are officially here—giving families across America a powerful new tool to help children build wealth, save for the future, and get a financial head start through tax-advantaged investments.

This

This is Calli Toler.

She was killed when an illegal alien failed to stop at a stop sign and crashed into her family’s car in North Carolina.

She was only 6 years old.

Calli is why I support ICE. https://t.co/0LSnzDJA2r

Proud to join @RepWalberg and @SenatorLankford in filing an amicus brief before the Supreme Court to defend faith-based schools.

Every family deserves the freedom to choose the school that best meets their child’s needs, including faith-based schools.

House Republicans are serious about the mandate the American people gave us and the work still left to do to put our nation back on track.

Through reconciliation 3.0, we will continue delivering on that mandate, and I urge our colleagues in the Senate to follow suit. https://t.co/mi7AzRRfEB

It is evident that the nation’s largest teachers union has completely abandoned its mission of serving students and teachers in favor of a radical partisan agenda.

This, along with deeply concerning examples like embracing divisive gender ideology and walking away from efforts

“If my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways, then will I hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin, and will heal their land.” — 2 Chronicles 7:14

There is no better way to celebrate America’s 250th birthday than with my eleven grandchildren by my side in our nation’s capital.

It is such a blessing to share our country’s history with them and teach them about the blessings that come with freedom.

God bless the USA! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/n1v4WklME3

Today, we celebrate two and a half centuries of American independence and give thanks for the nation that has stood as a beacon of freedom to the world.

Happy 250th birthday, America! May God continue to bless the greatest nation on earth. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/5BaeufZ9yO

As we celebrate 250 years of American independence, we should give thanks for the Founders who risked everything, the generations who defended our liberty, and the communities that faithfully passed on the values that sustain our nation.

The Founders gave us a republic. The

Incredibly honored to receive the 2025 @club4growth Defender of Economic Freedom Award.

I will continue fighting to lower taxes, rein in reckless spending, cut burdensome regulations, and protect the economic freedom of hardworking families across NC-08.

https://t.co/RQ6puh4fqP

As we prepare for America 250, I think of my dad, a WWII veteran whose plane was shot down and who endured captivity in a Nazi prison camp.

His story reminds us that freedom is never free.

May we honor those who sacrificed by carrying their legacy forward. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/As9u0OcbNn

RT @SenatorBanks: Education is not one-size-fits-all.

The 90/10 rule singles out vocational & career schools while letting other schools p…

Career schools help students gain practical skills, pursue in-demand jobs, and choose the education path that best fits their goals.

That is why I am proud to introduce the PARITY Act, which would repeal the outdated 90/10 rule and end the double standard against career schools. https://t.co/hZDYyVCkCI
Learn more about the PARITY Act here: https://t.co/BnaCvzPm4T

RT @RepKeithSelf: ONE NATION. 

ONE LAW. 

PRESERVE THE CONSTITUTION. https://t.co/ZpECduiH8g

Almost one year ago, @POTUS signed the Working Families Tax Cuts into law.

As we celebrate America’s 250th birthday, we are celebrating a year of @HouseGOP putting hardworking American families first. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/Rs9mZCh92Q

While visiting Washington during America 250, Emelie Garcia, the 2026 Congressional Art Competition winner for NC-08, saw her artwork on display in the U.S. Capitol.

Her beautiful painting, “Keeping the Rain Away,” represents our district well.

Congratulations, Emelie! https://t.co/eSPVIKo2V7

Tonight, I had the honor of recognizing my constituent Frank Horne on the House floor in celebration of his 100th birthday.

A U.S. Navy veteran, Frank’s century of life has been marked by faith, family, service, and dedication to his community.

Happy 100th birthday, Frank! https://t.co/T7c6WKz6Jm

This is Tim Tarnowski.

Tim was driving his car when an illegal alien who was released into the United States under the Biden Administration carelessly drove through a stop sign, killing him.

Tim is why I support ICE. https://t.co/MsPGVR1xqH

Youth sports help children grow, build confidence, stay active, and learn the value of teamwork.
 
In @EdWorkforceCmte, I asked witnesses how we can address rising barriers and expand access so every child has the opportunity to play. https://t.co/ZvEEvo3WDS

As we prepare to celebrate 250 years of America, we should remember what made this nation different from the very beginning.

Our Founders declared that every person is created equal and that our freedoms are not gifts from government, but blessings from God.

That promise https://t.co/Hf5SdMjVn4

The SAVE America Act is simple: American elections should be decided by American citizens.

It’s time for the Senate to bring it to the floor for debate and have Democrats explain why they oppose voter ID and proof of citizenship. https://t.co/EM6WcJ8hB8
“Now the Lord is the Spirit, and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom.” — 2 Corinthians 3:17

During the markup, I was proud to speak in support of the Freedom of Association in Higher Education https://t.co/swXwio4OdI

assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-25T22:11:45Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
